heading: Congressional Record under frank of Members of Congress
label: 3212 Congressional Record under frank of Members of Congress
notes: Amendments1973—Subsec. (a). incorporated existing text in provisions designated as subsec. (a).Pub. L. 93–191Subsec. (b). incorporated existing text in provisions designated as subsec. (b), authorized sending, as franked mail, reprints of parts of Congressional Record, and authorized the mailing of Congressional Record if the listed matter is mailable as franked mail under .Pub. L. 93–191section 3210 of this title
Effective Date of 1973 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 93–191section 14 of Pub. L. 93–191section 3210 of this titleDec. 18, 1973
Effective DateSection effective , pursuant to Resolution No. 71–9 of the Board of Governors. See , set out as a note preceding .July 1, 1971section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title
amendments: Amendments1973—Subsec. (a). incorporated existing text in provisions designated as subsec. (a).Pub. L. 93–191Subsec. (b). incorporated existing text in provisions designated as subsec. (b), authorized sending, as franked mail, reprints of parts of Congressional Record, and authorized the mailing of Congressional Record if the listed matter is mailable as franked mail under .Pub. L. 93–191section 3210 of this title
Effective Date of 1973 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 93–191section 14 of Pub. L. 93–191section 3210 of this titleDec. 18, 1973

children.label: a
children.text: Members of Congress may send the Congressional Record as franked mail.

children.label: b
children.text: Members of Congress may send, as franked mail, any part of, or a reprint of any part of, the Congressional Record, including speeches or reports contained therein, if such matter is mailable as franked mail under .section 3210 of this title
